articles.headline: Snow to help buffer against threat of spring wildfires in N.L. but summer still risky, say scientists
articles.description: Snow lingering across Newfoundland and Labrador is a good sign for those worried about the possibility of spring fires but scientists say it’s too early to say if there will be another historic wildfire season this summer.
